# AsyncAPI Community

> AsyncAPI is an open-source initiative that seeks to improve the current state of Event-Driven Architectures (EDAs). Our mission is to make working with EDAs as easy as working with REST APIs.

This repository contains community governance, contribution guidelines, and operational assets for the AsyncAPI Initiative.

## Key Documents

- [README](https://github.com/asyncapi/community/blob/master/README.md): Overview of the community and how to get started.
- [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/asyncapi/community/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md): How pull requests are reviewed and merged.
- [CODE_OF_CONDUCT](https://github.com/asyncapi/community/blob/master/CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md): Community standards and expected behavior.
- [CODEOWNERS](https://github.com/asyncapi/community/blob/master/CODEOWNERS): Who maintains which parts of this repository.

## Governance

- [Governance](https://github.com/asyncapi/community/blob/master/docs/020-governance-and-policies/GOVERNANCE.md): How the Governance Board and TSC operate.
- [Charter](https://github.com/asyncapi/community/blob/master/docs/020-governance-and-policies/CHARTER.md): The formal charter of the AsyncAPI Initiative.
- [TSC Membership](https://github.com/asyncapi/community/blob/master/docs/020-governance-and-policies/TSC_MEMBERSHIP.md): Requirements and responsibilities for TSC members.
- [Voting](https://github.com/asyncapi/community/blob/master/docs/020-governance-and-policies/voting.md): How TSC voting works.
- [MAINTAINERS.yaml](https://github.com/asyncapi/community/blob/master/MAINTAINERS.yaml): Current list of maintainers across all AsyncAPI repos.
- [TSC_BOARD_MEMBERS.yaml](https://github.com/asyncapi/community/blob/master/TSC_BOARD_MEMBERS.yaml): Current TSC board members.

## Contributing

- [Contribution Flow](https://github.com/asyncapi/community/blob/master/docs/010-contribution-guidelines/contribution-flow.md): Step-by-step guide for making contributions.
- [Git Workflow](https://github.com/asyncapi/community/blob/master/docs/010-contribution-guidelines/git-workflow.md): How to fork, branch, and submit pull requests.
- [Conventional Commits](https://github.com/asyncapi/community/blob/master/docs/010-contribution-guidelines/conventional-commits.md): Required commit message format.
- [Style Guide](https://github.com/asyncapi/community/blob/master/docs/011-styleguide/aboutguide.md): Writing and formatting standards for documentation.

## Community Programs

- [Ambassador Program](https://github.com/asyncapi/community/blob/master/docs/020-governance-and-policies/AMBASSADOR_PROGRAM.md): How to become an AsyncAPI Ambassador.
- [Mentorship](https://github.com/asyncapi/community/blob/master/docs/050-mentorship-program): Information about LFX and GSoC mentorship.
- [Onboarding](https://github.com/asyncapi/community/blob/master/docs/000-onboarding): Guides for new contributors.

## AI Contributions

- [AI Contributing](https://github.com/asyncapi/community/blob/master/AI_CONTRIBUTING.md): Guidelines for submitting AI-assisted contributions.
